qa_pairs.question: Describe your real-time threat detection capabilities.
qa_pairs.answer: Helios EDR ingests endpoint telemetry (process, file, registry, network), cloud audit logs (AWS CloudTrail, Azure Activity, GCP Audit), identity events (Okta, Azure AD), and email metadata. Our streaming detection engine applies 1,400+ behavioral rules and an ML classifier with a median detection-to-alert latency of 8 seconds (p95: 22 seconds) measured across our production fleet in Q4 2023.

qa_pairs.question: What compliance certifications do you hold?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios Security holds SOC 2 Type II (last audit completed 2024-01-15), ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (recertified 2023-11-02), and PCI DSS Level 1 Service Provider. We are FedRAMP Moderate 'In Process' with an expected ATO date of Q3 2024.

qa_pairs.question: What is your pricing model?
qa_pairs.answer: Per-endpoint annual subscription. List price $48/endpoint/year for EDR, $72/endpoint/year for EDR+MDR bundle. Volume discounts begin at 1,000 endpoints (10%) and 5,000 endpoints (22%). Minimum contract term is 12 months; multi-year discounts available.

qa_pairs.question: How many financial-services customers do you have?
qa_pairs.answer: As of Q1 2024 we serve 47 financial-services customers including regional banks, credit unions, and fintech platforms. Named references (with permission): Ridgeline Credit Union, Northstar Capital, and PayWave Inc.

qa_pairs.question: Describe your data residency and encryption posture for EU customers.
qa_pairs.answer: EU customers are provisioned into our Frankfurt (eu-central-1) region; telemetry never leaves the EU boundary. Data at rest is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using customer-scoped keys managed in AWS KMS (BYOK supported). Data in transit uses TLS 1.3 with mutual authentication between agent and cloud.

qa_pairs.question: What integrations does your SIEM support?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios SIEM ships with 180+ native connectors including Palo Alto, Cisco, Fortinet, CrowdStrike, Okta, Azure AD, AWS, GCP, Azure, ServiceNow, Jira, and Slack. A generic syslog/CEF ingestion endpoint and a REST Log Forwarder API cover custom sources.

qa_pairs.question: Provide your SOC 2 report date.
qa_pairs.answer: Our most recent SOC 2 Type II report covers the period ending 2023-06-30 and was issued 2023-08-10.

qa_pairs.question: What is your alert latency SLA?
qa_pairs.answer: Contractual SLA: 95% of high-severity detections alert within 60 seconds of telemetry receipt. Measured median is under 10 seconds.

qa_pairs.question: Company size and headquarters?
qa_pairs.answer: Helios Security was founded in 2017, is headquartered in Austin TX, and employs ~410 FTEs across R&D (Austin, Tel Aviv) and operations (Austin, Dublin).

qa_pairs.question: Are you HIPAA compliant? Will you sign a BAA?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Helios maintains a HIPAA Security Rule program audited annually by a third party (last assessment 2024-02-20). We will execute a Business Associate Agreement as part of the MSA.

qa_pairs.question: Do you offer volume discounts above 5,000 seats?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes. Tiered discounts: 1,000+ endpoints 10%, 5,000+ endpoints 22%, 10,000+ endpoints 30%. Custom enterprise pricing available above 25,000 endpoints.

qa_pairs.question: How do you handle agent updates?
qa_pairs.answer: The Helios endpoint agent self-updates via a signed delta channel. Updates are staged: canary (1%) → broad (25%) → full, with automatic rollback on health-check failure. Customers can pin versions and approve releases via the console.
